prompt.content: Point A is rotated about center O to create point A′. Which statement must be true?

<svg viewBox='0 0 260 220' role='img' aria-label='Point A rotated around center O to point A prime'><circle cx='130' cy='110' r='75' fill='none' stroke='lightgray' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><circle cx='130' cy='110' r='5' fill='black'/><text x='138' y='115' font-size='15'>O</text><circle cx='205' cy='110' r='5' fill='black'/><text x='212' y='115' font-size='15'>A</text><circle cx='130' cy='35' r='5' fill='black'/><text x='138' y='40' font-size='15'>A′</text><line x1='130' y1='110' x2='205' y2='110' stroke='gray' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='130' y1='110' x2='130' y2='35' stroke='gray' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 160 110 A 30 30 0 0 0 130 80' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><text x='150' y='91' font-size='14'>θ</text></svg>

choices.content: OA and OA′ are the same length, and angle AOA′ is the angle of rotation.
OA′ must be longer than OA.
Segment AA′ must be perpendicular to a line of reflection.
A and A′ must be connected by a horizontal segment.

steps.content: In a rotation, a point and its image stay the same distance from the center. The angle formed at the center is the angle of rotation.
